understanding.goal_understanding: Finish the current level (BP35) by navigating the tile grid to reach the goal gem tile marked `+` without landing on spikes, using up to 2 attempts with 50 turns each, then continue clearing levels until winning the game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn you can MOVE_LEFT or MOVE_RIGHT (horizontal only); after the horizontal step, gravity automatically pulls the character in the current gravity direction until they land on a solid/support tile, hit a hazard (spikes end the run), or reach the goal. CLICK removes a clickable/breakable tile at a specified [x,y] to open or change fall paths and does not move the player; UNDO reverts the previous action. Efficient play relies on using landing previews (left_landing/right_landing and corridor_scan) to choose safe moves—especially toward passage columns that drop to a new y-level—and using clicks to remove blocks that prevent progress along the gravity direction.
